# Crafted Edge Solutions

> Kenya-based digital systems company building websites, automations, dashboards, AI assistants, payment systems, and digital marketing solutions for growing businesses across Africa.

Crafted Edge Solutions designs and builds the full operational layer for businesses — not just websites, but the booking flows, automations, payments, and dashboards that make a business run digitally. Based in Nairobi, Kenya. Globally capable.

Contact: admin@craftededgesolutions.africa | +254 769 071 925 | WhatsApp: https://wa.me/254769071925

## Services

- [Professional Websites](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): Custom, fast, conversion-focused websites built to turn visitors into enquiries. Mobile-first, SEO-optimised, no templates.
- [Booking & Client Portals](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): Online booking systems, intake forms, client portals with automated confirmations, reminders, and payment collection.
- [Workflow Automation](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): Lead follow-ups, invoice triggers, onboarding flows, approval workflows, and data sync between tools — running 24/7.
- [AI Assistants & Chatbots](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): Custom AI trained on your business for FAQs, lead qualification, appointment booking, and 24/7 client support.
- [Payment & Subscription Systems](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): M-Pesa (Daraja API), card payments via Stripe/Flutterwave, recurring billing, automated receipts.
- [Dashboards & Reporting](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): Real-time business dashboards pulling data from multiple sources — revenue, bookings, team activity.
- [Digital Marketing](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/services.html): SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, email marketing campaigns, social media management, and performance reporting.

## Solutions

- [Solutions Overview](https://craftededgesolutions.africa/solutions.html): Industry-specific digital systems for fitness studios, service businesses, e-commerce, internal operations, and AI-powered customer engagement.
